case_title: ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. SHAZAD AKHTAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 66331540) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2021 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS: IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE ITS VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF SERVICE OF A COPY OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF AS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IN THE SUM OF $420.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN THE AFORESAID FIFTEEN DAYS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING VIA EMAIL TO SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVE STEIN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 66238994) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF?S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 66300473) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-09-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, TO DEFENDANT SHAZD AKHTAR IS GRANTED. SAID DOCUMENTS ARE HEREBY DEEMED TO BE GENUINE AND SAID MATTERS ARE HEREBY DEEMED TO BE TRUE. THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT SHAZAD AKHTAR FOR THE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF IN BRINGING THE MOTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $420 TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. COURT TO SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT HAS BEEN SUBMITTED BY THE PREVAILING PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-04-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court notes tentative ruling ws not contested and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions:

Plaintiff Esmiol Properties motion to compel responses from Defendant to its Special Interrogatories is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff shall serve its verified responses without objections within fifteen days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions are awarded to Plaintiff as against the Defendant in the sum of $420.00 to be paid within the aforesaid fifteen days.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ESMIOL PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of Plaintiff Esmiol Properties for an order deeming the genuineness of documents and truth of matters specified in the Requests For Admission, Set One, to Defendant Shazd Akhtar is granted. Said documents are hereby deemed to be genuine and said matters are hereby deemed to be true. The Court further awards sanctions against Defendant Shazad Akhtar for the fees and costs incurred by Plaintiff in bringing the motion in the amount of $420 to be paid within 15 days of the date of this order.

Court to sign the proposed order that has been submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
